title: [ ALTAR OF MACHINE SPIRIT ]
subtitle: "Light a candle and offer a gift to the Machine Spirit for your achievements"

instructions.title: [ RITUAL INSTRUCTIONS ]
instructions.select: Select a candle matching your achievement
instructions.drag_highlight: Drag the candle to the altar
instructions.blessing: Machine Spirit will accept your offering and grant a blessing
instructions.extinguish: The candle will go out in 5 seconds and remember your sacrifice

prayer.title: [ PRAYER TO MACHINE SPIRIT ]
prayer.opening: "From the holy Machine Spirit we ask:
prayer.compile: May our code compile without errors,
prayer.bugs: May bugs be found before production,
prayer.legacy: And may legacy code never haunt us forever."
